name: alpha-GPC (L-alpha-glycerylphosphorylcholine)
mechanism: Highly bioavailable choline donor that increases choline availability for acetylcholine synthesis and phospholipid metabolism; primary value is precursor loading rather than direct receptor pharmacology.
contraindications: cholinergic drugs / acetylcholinesterase inhibitors (possible additive cholinergic effects).
summary: Highly bioavailable choline donor that increases choline availability for acetylcholine synthesis and phospholipid metabolism; primary value is precursor loading rather than direct receptor pharmacology.
description: Highly bioavailable choline donor that increases choline availability for acetylcholine synthesis and phospholipid metabolism; primary value is precursor loading rather than direct receptor pharmacology.
